hero.title: Arm Every Team with Intelligence
hero.subtitle: AI-powered enterprise intelligence solutions, helping SMEs reduce costs and boost efficiency

intro.heading: What We Do
intro.description: Jeff AI specializes in providing AI intelligence solutions for SMEs. From diagnostic assessment to solution delivery, we accompany enterprises through every step of their intelligent transformation journey.

items.title: Lightweight Start
items.description: No feature bloat. We solve real pain points with minimal cost to validate AI value.

items.title: Delivery-Focused
items.description: We deliver working systems, not slide decks. Actual operation is our acceptance standard.

items.title: Global Vision
items.description: International team tracking cutting-edge AI worldwide, bringing best practices to your business.

items.title: Continuous Iteration
items.description: AI evolves, so do our solutions. One partnership, long-term benefits.
